creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I am unable to recreate this issue. I set 
CC=/usr/local/libexec/ccache/world/gcc46, then test built a port with 
known clang warnings. No warnings showed. Removing the CC (and building 
with clang) and rebuilding did show the clang warnings. Can you please 
retest and provide build logs as well as output for 'make -V CC' and 
'make -V PATH'?
